title: PrdItem
description: A single feature item in the Product Requirements Document

description.description: Detailed description of what this feature does

priority.description: Feature priority: P0 = critical blocker, P6 = nice-to-have

build_pass.description: Set to true by build agent when feature is implemented and tests pass

qa_pass.description: Set to true by QA agent after successful manual/automated verification

dependencies.description: List of feature IDs that must be build_pass before this feature can be built

dependent_on.description: Alias for dependencies — feature IDs this feature depends on

steps.description: Acceptance criteria / test steps for verifying the feature

behavior.description: Description of expected behavior (used by QA for comparison)

pages.description: App routes or pages this feature affects
